description_long: This is a freestanding golf course advertising board mounted on a sturdy, square wooden post with a pointed cap. The front face features a black sign with colorful graphics, including a golf hole layout, the label '1 PAR', and a list of yardages in different colors. The lower section of the board displays a green area with a call to advertise and contact information. The sign is bordered by a thick wooden frame that matches the post, giving it a robust and weather-resistant appearance. The back of the board is plain and unadorned, showing only the wooden structure. The overall design is utilitarian, intended for outdoor use in a park or golf course setting.
description: A freestanding wooden advertising board with a black sign displaying golf course information and advertising space, mounted on a thick post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed golf course map, yardages, and advertising section on a black sign with colorful graphics.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the wooden post and the protruding sign, with the cap visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back of the sign and post, with no graphics or text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the post's thickness and the sign's edge.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with a pointed cap and beveled edges
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed sign with golf hole information and advertising contact details
